title: TFC Black Powder Weapons
body:
## Small mod providing full compatibility between TFC and Musket mod
## Create the first black powder weapon

=====================================================================
- added new components (bullets, gunpowder pinch, gun barrels, handle gun)
- added recipes for an anvil of metal parts

======================================================================

![split](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ydtfCbHK/images/9ad28062d05e908d82b51de32f0f51745c35d82d.png)
